description_long: This is a modern, minimalist sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a light gray fabric upholstery. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and plush for comfort. The armrests are broad, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a boxy, geometric appearance. The sofa sits on a low-profile, sled-style base with thin, straight legs that are slightly recessed, contributing to its contemporary look. The upholstery is a solid, smooth fabric with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing simplicity and elegance. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as public lobbies, modern parks, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, light gray sofa with broad armrests, two large seat and back cushions, and a sleek, low-profile base. Its minimalist design and solid fabric make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two large seat and back cushions, and broad, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the clean lines of the sofa's back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four thin, straight sled-style legs, slightly recessed at the corners, likely metal with a minimalist, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
